debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_starts_in_1 :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.startsIn1Condition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
⊢ u ≠ v

failed_attempts:
(by
        intro h_eq
        cases h_constructor
        cases h_eq)

(by
        intro h_eq
        have : ContextFreeDerivation G u v := ContextFreeDerivation.same h_eq
        have : (ContextFreeDerivation.same h_eq : ContextFreeDerivation G u v) =
            (ContextFreeDerivation.step dstep derivation sound : ContextFreeDerivation G u v) := by
              simpa [h_constructor] using congrArg (fun x => x) rfl
        cases this
        )

(by
        intro h_eq
        cases h_eq
        have : (cfd.nonZeroStepCondition) := by
          simp [ContextFreeDerivation.nonZeroStepCondition, h_constructor]
        rcases this with ⟨h_same, hcontra⟩
        cases hcontra
      )

(by
        intro h_uv
        subst h_uv
        cases h_constructor
      )

(by
        intro h_uv
        have : cfd = ContextFreeDerivation.same h_uv := by
          cases h_constructor
          rfl
        cases this))

(by
        intro h_uv
        rw [h_constructor] at h_starts_in_1
        cases h_starts_in_1
      )

(by
        intro h_eq
        have : ContextFreeDerivation.same h_eq = ContextFreeDerivation.step dstep derivation sound := by
          simpa [h_constructor] using congrArg (fun d => d) rfl
        cases this
      )

(by
        intro h_uv
        have : cfd = ContextFreeDerivation.same h_uv := by cases h_constructor; simp [h_uv]
        simp [this] at h_constructor
      )

(by
        intro h_uv
        have : cfd = ContextFreeDerivation.same h_uv := by
          cases h_constructor
          simp [h_uv]
        cases this)

(by
        intro h_uv
        have : cfd = ContextFreeDerivation.same h_uv := by
          cases cfd with
          | same h => simp [h_uv] at h
          | step step derivation sound =>
              cases (ContextFreeDerivation.noConfusion (h_constructor.symm))
        cases cfd with
        | same h => exact (ContextFreeDerivation.noConfusion (this.trans (by rfl)))
        | step step derivation sound =>
            cases (ContextFreeDerivation.noConfusion (this.trans (by rfl)))
      )

(by
        intro h_uv
        have : cfd = ContextFreeDerivation.same h_uv := by
          simpa [h_uv] using (rfl : cfd = ContextFreeDerivation.same h_uv)
        simpa [this] using h_constructor
      )

(by
        intro h_eq
        have : ContextFreeDerivation G u u := by
          simpa [h_eq] using (cast (by cases h_eq; rfl) cfd)
        cases this with
        | same h =>
          cases cfd with
          | same _ => cases (by simpa [h_eq] using h_constructor)
          | step _ _ _ => cases h_eq
        | step _ _ _ =>
          cases h_eq
        )

(by
        intro h_eq
        cases h_constructor
        cases h_eq
        exact ContextFreeDerivationStep.not_result_eq_u dstep (by simpa [sound])

(by
        intro h_eq
        have : cfd = ContextFreeDerivation.same h_eq := by

        cases h_constructor
        cases this)

(by

        have : cfd = ContextFreeDerivation.same h_uv := by cases h_constructor; rfl
        cases this

(by

        have : ContextFreeDerivation.same h_uv = ContextFreeDerivation.step dstep derivation sound := by

        cases this

(by
        intro h_uv
        have : cfd = ContextFreeDerivation.same h_uv := by

        cases cfd with

        | step step der sound =>

(by
